zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Ravens於1602年11月14日出生在英國素福爾可華迪斯費爾德時，她的父親Reverend Richard Ravens11599歲，母親Elizabeth Hedge36歲。她於大約1628年與John Coolidge在英國結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1691年8月22日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托享年88歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Ravens于1602年11月14日出生在英国素福爾可華迪斯費爾德时，她的父亲Reverend Richard Ravens11599岁，母亲Elizabeth Hedge36岁。她于大约1628年与John Coolidge在英国结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1691年8月22日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托享年88岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托。

nameMeanings.name: Ravens
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (London): variant of Raven , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Raven
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Raven (Old Norse Hrafn, Old English Hræfn, both meaning ‘raven’) or else a nickname from this word, probably denoting a dark-haired man.

English: occasionally perhaps also a topographic or habitational name referring to a house or inn distinguished by the sign of a raven (see 1 above). Surnames derived from house and inn signs are rare in English.
North German and Dutch: from Middle Low German rave(n) ‘raven’, a nickname or an old personal name. Compare 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Ravens was born on 14 November 1602, in Wattisfield, Suffolk, England, her father, Reverend Richard Ravens, was 11599 and her mother, Elizabeth Hedge, was 36. She married John Coolidge about 1628, in England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 22 August 1691, in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 88, and was buried in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Ravens est née le 14 novembre 1602, à Wattisfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Reverend Richard Ravens, avait 11599 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Hedge, avait 36 ans. Elle a épousé John Coolidge environ 1628, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 22 août 1691, à Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 88 ans, et a été enterrée à Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Ravens am 14. November 1602 in Wattisfield, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Reverend Richard Ravens 11599 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Hedge 36. Sie hat um 1628 in England John Coolidge geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 22. August 1691 im Alter von 88 Jahren in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Ravens è nata il il 14 novembre 1602 nel Wattisfield, Suffolk, England, sua padre, Reverend Richard Ravens, aveva 11599 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Hedge, aveva 36 anni. Lei sposato John Coolidge circa 1628, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 22 agosto 1691, nel Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 88 anni, e fu sepolta a Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Ravensが1602年11月14日にイギリススフォルクワッティスフィールドで生まれた時，父Reverend Richard Ravensは11599歳，母Elizabeth Hedgeは36歳であった。約1628年にイギリスでJohn Coolidgeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1691年8月22日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスワテルトウンで88歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスワテルトウンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Ravens(이)가 1602년 11월 14일 영국 수폴크 왓티스필드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Reverend Richard Ravens(은)는 11599세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Hedge(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 대략 1628년 영국에서 John Coolidge(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1691년 8월 22일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 왓르타운에서 88세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 왓르타운에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Ravens nasceu em 14 de novembro de 1602, em Wattisfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Reverend Richard Ravens, tinha 11599 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Hedge, tinha 36 anos. Ela casou-se com John Coolidge aproximadamente 1628, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 22 de agosto de 1691, em Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 88 anos, e foi sepultada em Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Ravens родилась 14 ноября 1602 г. в местности ваттисфиелд, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Reverend Richard Ravens было 11599 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Hedge, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Coolidge около 1628 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла 22 августа 1691 г. в местности вэитиртоун, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 88 лет и была похоронена в местности вэитиртоун, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mary Ravens nació el 14 de noviembre de 1602, en Wattisfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Reverend Richard Ravens, tenía 11599 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Hedge, tenía 36 años. Se casó con John Coolidge aproximadamente 1628, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 22 de agosto de 1691, en Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 88 años, y fue sepultada en Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
